backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the black and red color scheme implementation in frontend/src/index.css with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing the passkey authentication flow, device name input, sensitivity popup, and black/red theme styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining black and red theme variables for light and dark modes across all UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with title 'ENZOxSENSI' that loads the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component orchestrating authentication flow between PasskeyScreen, DeviceNameScreen, and SensitivityPopup with header/footer layout including skull logo.
frontend/src/components/DeviceNameScreen: Form component for entering device name with validation that triggers the Generate button to display sensitivity settings popup.
frontend/src/components/PasskeyScreen.ts: Authentication screen validating passkey 'enzonvrfall' client-side with error handling and Instagram follow prompt for passkey access.
frontend/src/components/SensitivityPopup: Modal dialog displaying static sensitivity values (General: 176, Red Dot: 98, 2x: 190, 4x: 190) for the entered device name.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication with AuthClient, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file as the application uses only client-side logic without backend queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with a black and red color scheme, including variables for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar components using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root render with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH color mappings, container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, and accordion animations, plus typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing ENZOxSENSI app with passkey authentication ('enzonvrfall'), device name input, and static sensitivity value generation (general 176, red dot 98, 2x/4x 190) with black and red theming.
